title: scopolia mariae
intro: Scopolia mariae, also known as Devil's Clapper, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Solanaceae, native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being a spasmolytic and anticholinergic. The health benefits of Scopolia mariae include its ability to treat conditions such as asthma, bronchitis, and whooping cough, as well as its use as a sedative and analgesic. Scopolia mariae can be prepared into herbal remedies, including infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
